title: Better Crosshair Enhanced
description: 🎯 Replaces the default crosshair with a small, unobtrusive dot for better precision and a cleaner HUD.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa71b45f6ab66d0b3fb32973ceded387a49359d1.png)

## 🎯 A Clean & Precise Crosshair for Better Focus !

- This resource pack is designed for players who want a minimal, distraction-free crosshair for improved precision and a cleaner HUD, perfect for PvP, archery, or simply enhancing your gameplay experience.

🔥 Enjoy a sharper and more focused aim with **Better Crosshair Enhanced** in Minecraft 1.21+ !

![titre](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7d326bf2928fb23614e281dd30648fa3115405a_0.webp)

🎯 Thanks for using **Better Crosshair Enhanced** for **Minecraft** !
